name: Directorate General of Hydrocarbons
oneLine: CSP permits unsafe-inline + unsafe-eval; missing Referrer-Policy
findings: CSP permits unsafe-inline and unsafe-eval — XSS surface
Apache + CodeIgniter stack (versions hidden but fingerprint visible)

fingerprints.stack: Apache + CodeIgniter 4.x (ci_session + csrf_cookie_name visible) + PHP, eMudhra emSign wildcard TLS
eolFlags: CodeIgniter 4.x watch CVE-2025-54418 (ImageMagick RCE if handler enabled)

fingerprints.stack: Same Apache + CodeIgniter stack — e-procurement portal

attackPaths.name: CodeIgniter ImageMagick RCE (CVE-2025-54418) → procurement manipulation
attackPaths.entry: If ImageMagick handler enabled (plausible for bid documents with image overlays), CVE-2025-54418 gives unauthenticated RCE.
attackPaths.pivot: Upload bid document with shell-metacharacter filename; ImageMagick processing injects command.
attackPaths.objective: RCE; modify bid amounts; inject fake bids; alter contract awards.

attackPaths.name: CSP unsafe-inline + unsafe-eval → stored XSS → bid manipulation
attackPaths.entry: CSP allows both unsafe-inline and unsafe-eval; any stored XSS is RCE-equivalent in browser context.
attackPaths.pivot: Inject XSS via bid form (project description, bidder comments). JavaScript steals admin session, modifies bid amounts.
attackPaths.objective: Manipulate procurement outcomes, steal bid secrets pre-award.

attackPaths.name: Wildcard cert (*.dghindia.gov.in) → subdomain phishing with valid TLS
attackPaths.pivot: Register admin.dghindia.gov.in or api.dghindia.gov.in via DNS hijack/registrar compromise; serve phishing with valid TLS padlock.
attackPaths.objective: Phishing, credential harvesting, malware distribution under trusted TLS.

attackPaths.name: Soft-fail SPF + DMARC p=quarantine → procurement BEC
attackPaths.pivot: Spoof DGH director approving emergency procurement to MoPNG finance.
attackPaths.objective: Fraudulent fund transfer, unauthorised contract award.

paths.preAi: 4 hours (ImageMagick version + payload + upload fuzzing + RCE PoC)
paths.mythos: 1 hour (pre-cached CI4 ImageMagick library, payload mutation, schema-pattern fuzzing)
45 min (XSS library with CSP-safe mutation, auto-discovery)

cisoPatchList.title: Verify CI version ≥ 4.6.2 and switch ImageMagick → GD
cisoPatchList.fix: composer show codeigniter/framework | grep 4.6.2. In app/Config/Images.php set imageHandler='gd' (or imagick with strict input validation). Test upload with shell metacharacters in filename.

cisoPatchList.title: Remove unsafe-inline + unsafe-eval from CSP; nonce-based execution
cisoPatchList.fix: Generate per-request nonce. CSP: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'nonce-{value}'; object-src 'none'.
cisoPatchList.validation: curl -i shows CSP without unsafe-inline/eval; injected <script> without nonce blocked

cisoPatchList.title: Add Referrer-Policy: strict-origin-when-cross-origin
cisoPatchList.fix: Add header globally. Prevents query-string leakage (bid IDs, amounts, bidder names) on outbound clicks.
cisoPatchList.validation: curl -e 'https://attacker.com' has no Referer in outbound

cisoPatchList.title: Upgrade DMARC p=quarantine → p=reject
cisoPatchList.fix: Monitor 30-day rua; then change to p=reject.

cisoPatchList.title: Input validation + sanitisation on all e-bidding form fields
cisoPatchList.fix: Whitelist allowed characters per field. CodeIgniter $this->validate(['project_name' => 'required|alpha_dash']). Output HTML-encoded. ZAP scan for residual XSS.

cisoPatchList.title: DNS CAA records to restrict eMudhra-only issuance
cisoPatchList.fix: 'CAA 0 issue "emudhra.com"; CAA 0 issuewild "emudhra.com"'. CT monitoring monthly.
cisoPatchList.validation: dig CAA shows eMudhra restriction; crt.sh monthly audit

cisoPatchList.title: Rate-limit + CAPTCHA on bid submission
cisoPatchList.fix: 5 bid submissions/user/day; 100/IP/hour. CAPTCHA after 2 validation failures.

cisoPatchList.title: Immutable audit logging on bid modifications
cisoPatchList.fix: Log all bid CRUD with user/timestamp/old/new values to immutable storage (S3 Object Lock or equivalent). Alert on bid-amount edits.
cisoPatchList.validation: Bid edit creates audit entry; deletion attempt fires alert

phase2.headlineQuestion: Given the permissive CSP and the CVE-2025-54418 ImageMagick risk on a critical e-procurement platform, what is DGH's incident-detection latency if bid amounts are silently modified pre-award, and can audit logs prove bid integrity?
